name: LRP Firmware Update Tool
description: Update firmware on LRP Flow, iX8 and Spin ESCs over the LRP USB Bridge V3.

install.setup_relative_path: LRP Firmware Update Tool 2.2.0 Win Setup.exe

links.name: Flow X TC-spec ESC manual (EN PDF)

notes: Zip wraps an Inno Setup installer; RC Central runs it silently into the tool dir. Verified end-to-end 2026-07-20: /DIR={dest} is honoured and nothing lands outside the tool dir. exe_relative_path MUST stay pinned - the installed app is lrpupdater.exe, and EVERY exe in the finished directory is rejected by _EXE_SKIP ('update', 'setup', 'unins'), so the fallback scan finds nothing and install fails with ExeNotFound if the pin is dropped. Requires the LRP USB Bridge V3 (part 500904). Flow X TC-spec/StockSpec are 1/10 on-road sensored ESCs; LRP is not a drift default, so this sits at the edge of the catalog's scope. Version is in the URL and rots on the next release.
